coachAM: Your "new sprint" resolve is being systematically undermined by the very habits meant to fuel it; the journal entries reveal a consistent pattern of morning gratitude overshadowed by evening self-sabotage, indicating your discipline is a fragile morning intention, not a resilient 24/7 commitment. The root cause is a profound lack of *evening discipline*, which erodes your physical and mental readiness for the next day, directly collapsing your Sleep, Training, and Sovereign Morning protocols and ultimately capping your ability to build an elite-level trajectory. Tonight, at 7 PM, physically place your phone in a separate room and do not retrieve it until your Sovereign Morning is complete.
